query: SELECT COUNT(*) as lesson_count FROM lessons; INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) SELECT l.id, CONCAT('Question 1 for ', l.title), 'multiple_choice', '["Option A","Option B","Option C","Option D"]', 'Option A', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM lessons l LIMIT 190;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as lesson_count FROM lessons; INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) SELECT l.id, CONCAT('Question 1 for ', l.title), 'multiple_choice', '["Option A","Option B","Option C","Option D"]', 'Option A', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM lessons l LIMIT 190;
